summary: India provides digital immigration and travel services through the Passport Seva portal for passport applications and tracking, the e-Visa system for eligible foreign nationals, and the Bureau of Immigration's online services. However, processing still requires in-person visits for verification and biometrics, and some services experience delays and accessibility issues.

sources.title: Passport Seva - Ministry of External Affairs

notes: The Passport Seva Project operates through a network of Passport Seva Kendras (PSKs) and Post Office Passport Seva Kendras for document verification and biometrics. India's e-Visa facility covers over 160 countries for tourism, business, medical, and conference purposes. The Immigration, Visa and Foreigners Registration & Tracking (IVFRT) system manages immigration checkpoints digitally.
